headline: Euromonitor Reveals Top Global Shoe Brands in New Report
summary: Nike, Adidas, Skechers and New Balance are the top four shoe brands in both the world and in the U.S., says data from Euromonitor International.

raw.headline: Euromonitor Reveals Top Global Shoe Brands in New Report

headline: Wall Street’s $76 Target on Nike Looks Absurd — Until You Look at the Numbers
summary: Nike (NYSE: NKE) is trading at $52.71, just above a 52-week low of $52.18. Wall Street’s $76 consensus price target represents a gap of roughly 44%. For a company once considered the gold standard of consumer brands, that distance between price and analyst conviction demands explanation. Nike is the world’s largest supplier of athletic shoes ... Wall Street’s $76 Target on Nike Looks Absurd — Until You Look at the Numbers

headline: Why REI treats CX as a critical business function
summary: The outdoor retailer is focused on doubling down on its differentiators, REI’s Clay Walton-House said. That means investing in its elevated services and member experience.
